name: Water Heater.Template → Publish
description: You can also publish state to a template water heater from elsewhere in your YAML file with the `water_heater.template.publish` action.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the template water heater.

config_entries.label: Away
config_entries.description: The away mode state to publish.

config_entries.label: Current Temperature
config_entries.description: The current measured temperature to publish.

config_entries.label: Is On
config_entries.description: The boolean On/Off state to publish.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: The operation mode to publish. See [Water Heater Modes](https://esphome.io/components/water_heater#water-heater-modes) for options.

config_entries.label: Target Temperature
config_entries.description: The target setpoint temperature to publish.
